title: Living in Boulder vlog 12 - 12  - 18: 11 days in a row at 100 miles and getting stronger

transcript.text: What's up, what's up, living in Boulder. It's 8.57 p.m., so I want to get this thing done with so I can do my riding.
Super motivated to do the riding.
I felt, I got done with my riding yesterday, and I was totally, like, I mean, you know, I was tired and everything.
Sore legs and tired, but it wasn't as bad, like, as before.
I was at a whole level better, and then today I didn't actually have to sleep all day long.
It was better.
My legs are super sore, but I don't know, because just on my general energy level, I don't know, man.
It may even be possible for me to break six hours on the rollers for 100 miles today.
I think I may be, this may be a day where I'm starting to get stronger as opposed to just staying at the same level.
I've been staying, I was at, like, 6.15, you know, for 100 miles.
It's, like, my level.
But I might break six today, dude, I feel pretty good.
And then, you know, if I break six today, I probably might break it, and then I might just be breaking it every day from now on.
But who knows, maybe it'll get worse.
That's the fun thing about being a professional athlete is all of the predictions, you know.
You make a bunch of predictions, and then you see if the predictions come true, and then you go, oh, wow.
Okay.
So, it's like you're a scientist.
So, yeah, that's my prediction.
Yeah, but I got up, but I did sleep.
I mean, it took me forever to get to sleep.
It took me longer to get to sleep than before, like 8 in the morning or something.
And then by the time I did sleep, I could have slept all night.
I could have slept all day and all night.
So, I kind of had to force myself out.
My mom got and called me earlier today, and she said she had some soup and invited me over for that.
Then I fell asleep again, and I got up a couple hours later, went over there,
And had a couple of bowls of soup and hung out for a little bit, and then came back and went to the store
And got some, like, more fruit juice, and I don't have all that many goos.
So, hopefully my goos will hold out, and if they don't, and I have, like, goos and energy bars,
And if they don't, I guess I'll just, you know, bananas, just do bananas.
So, I ordered a bunch of goos.
Hopefully, I should have bought them today.
I totally spaced it.
Like, my brain still hasn't turned on yet.
So, but, yeah, I need to remember to get goos tomorrow so that I have food,
And I don't even know who sells the big ones.
I can't remember where I got these.
I got those from, like, last year.
Maybe, I think it was full cycle, so I'll have to go there.
I'm surprised that more people sell them.
Um, but, uh, but they're perfect.
Rocket fuel.
I should have ordered more.
Okay, so that's it.
All right, peace out.
